games.title: Minecraft
games.description: A sandbox video game that allows players to build with a variety of different blocks in a 3D procedurally generated world.
games.installCommand: echo 'Installing Minecraft...' && sleep 3 && echo 'Minecraft installed successfully!'

games.title: Terraria
games.description: An action-adventure sandbox game with 2D sprite tile-based graphics in a procedurally generated world.
games.installCommand: echo 'Installing Terraria...' && sleep 2 && echo 'Terraria installed successfully!'

games.title: Stardew Valley
games.description: A simulation role-playing game where you inherit your grandfather's old farm plot in Stardew Valley.
games.installCommand: echo 'Installing Stardew Valley...' && sleep 3 && echo 'Stardew Valley installed successfully!'

games.title: Hollow Knight
games.description: A challenging 2D action-adventure game set in a vast interconnected underground kingdom.
games.installCommand: echo 'Installing Hollow Knight...' && sleep 2 && echo 'Hollow Knight installed successfully!'

games.title: Celeste
games.description: A platforming video game about climbing a mountain while overcoming your inner demons.
games.installCommand: echo 'Installing Celeste...' && sleep 2 && echo 'Celeste installed successfully!'

games.title: Portal 2
games.description: A first-person puzzle-platform game that uses physics and logic to solve challenges.
games.installCommand: echo 'Installing Portal 2...' && sleep 3 && echo 'Portal 2 installed successfully!'
